page: Microsoft Azure M192ims_v2 is an isolated, memory-intensive server instance belonging to the MISMediumMemoryv2 family. It features 192 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and powered by Intel processors under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 4096.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 21.33 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external Premium Storage options. It does not feature any GPUs, nor does it include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to its isolated hardware profile and massive memory capacity, the M192ims_v2 represents a high-end resource tier designed for enterprise workloads. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration are key architectural tradeoffs to consider. It is designed for memory-heavy workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems.
description: Microsoft Azure M192ims_v2 is an isolated, memory-intensive server instance from the MISMediumMemoryv2 family. Running on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it provides 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 4096.0 GB of RAM, which translates to 21.33 GB of memory per core. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring external Premium Storage for data persistence. This hardware configuration represents a premium, high-density resource tier designed for massive memory footprints. The primary tradeoffs include the absence of local storage and GPU capabilities, which limits its use in graphics-heavy or local-disk-dependent tasks. It is structured for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning applications, and heavy data warehousing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M192ims_v2 is an isolated, memory-intensive server featuring 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 4096 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for large-scale enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M192ims_v2 is an isolated server with 192 Intel vCPUs and 4096 GB of RAM, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: An isolated, memory-intensive x86_64 server configuration featuring 192 dedicated vCPUs and 4 terabytes of system memory.

4096.0 GB of system memory providing 21.33 GB per core
